title: Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Ministry of Health – Manatū Hauora
The Ministry of Health is the government’s lead advisor on health priorities and policy. We regulate and monitor the health system to deliver better health outcomes for all New Zealanders.

## Popular topics Ngā kaupapa arotini
- Budget 2026: Vote Health
- Middle East conflict
- New Zealand Health Survey
- Nitrous oxide regulatory changes

## Setting the direction for New Zealand’s health system
Setting the direction for New Zealand’s health system
The Government Policy Statement on Health 2024–2027 sets out the Government’s priorities for the health system over the next 3 years, to ensure it’s delivering quality care for New Zealanders.

## Health response to global fuel and supply chain pressures
The conflict in the Middle East is creating uncertainty in supply chains and fuel markets. This has flow on effects for essential services, including health care.

## Warning labels for anti-seizure medicines during pregnancy
Introducing pregnancy warning labels to help reduce harm from anti-seizure medicines during pregnancy.

## 2024/25 Health Survey results now available
The latest results on the health of New Zealanders are available now.
